title: 🚨 NWS Extreme: Blizzard Warning
summary:
* WHAT...Blizzard conditions. Winds gusting as high as 45 mph.

* WHERE...Kivalina and Red Dog Dock.

* WHEN...Until 4 AM AKDT Tuesday.

* IMPACTS...Travel could be very difficult. Areas of blowing snow
could significantly reduce visibility to 1/4 mile or less at times.
Travel should be restricted to emergencies only. If you must travel,
have a winter survival kit with you. If you get stranded,...

sourceAttribution: Source: National Weather Service CAP Feed

title: 🚨 NWS Moderate: Winter Weather Advisory
summary:
* WHAT...Blowing and drifting snow. Winds gusting as high as 40 mph.

* WHERE...Bering Strait Coast and Diomede.

* WHEN...Until 4 AM AKDT Tuesday.

* IMPACTS...Travel could be difficult. Areas of blowing snow could
significantly reduce visibility to 1/2 mile or less at times.
Use caution while traveling, especially in open areas. Visit
511.alaska.gov or call 5 1 1 for the latest road conditions.
sourceAttribution: Source: National Weather Service CAP Feed

title: 🚨 NWS Severe: Winter Storm Warning
summary:
* WHAT...Heavy snow and blowing snow. Additional snow accumulations
between 6 and 12 inches with locally higher amounts above pass
level. Winds gusting as high as 40 mph.

* WHERE...Eastern Alaska Range South of Trims Camp.

* WHEN...Until 4 PM AKDT Monday.

* IMPACTS...Travel could be very difficult. Areas of blowing snow
could significantly reduce visibility.

title: 🚨 NWS Moderate: Winter Weather Advisory
summary:
* WHAT...Snow and blowing snow. Additional snow accumulations
between 2 and 4 inches. Winds gusting as high as 30 mph.

* WHERE...Dalton Highway Summits.

* WHEN...Until 4 PM AKDT Monday.

* IMPACTS...Travel could be difficult.
Slow down and use caution while traveling. Visit 511.alaska.gov or
call 5 1 1 for the latest road conditions.
